title: WSET Knowledge Map — Relationship
description: A directed semantic relationship between two concepts. Relationships are the edges of the knowledge graph.

relationship_id.description: Stable unique identifier. Format: R_{SOURCE}__{TYPE}__{TARGET} — e.g. R_COOL_CLIMATE__INCREASES__ACIDITY

strength.description: How strong or reliable this relationship is in practice.

conditions.description: Any conditions under which this relationship holds. Null if unconditional.

direction.description: Whether the relationship is directional or bidirectional.

explanation.description: One to three sentences explaining the mechanism behind this relationship. Must be technically accurate.

exam_relevance.description: How frequently this relationship is tested in WSET L3 exams.

tutor_use.description: Whether the Tutor Agent should use this relationship in explanations.

examiner_use.description: Whether the Examiner Agent may use this relationship. False for all pedagogically-derived relationships.
